dependencyHandoff.notesOnBlockers: export work stays local-only until the next maintainer has remote access

items.item: Add an audit-log export summary download

backlog.capabilityGap: admins can export raw audit data but not a compact summary for review
backlog.evidence: support escalations keep asking for a lightweight summary bundle
backlog.nextDecision: resume from local handoff once remote access returns
backlog.whyNow: the implementation and proof already exist, only the landing path is deferred
backlog.successSignal: admins can download a concise audit summary without manual spreadsheet cleanup
backlog.entryConstraints: stay local-only and avoid remote automation
backlog.openRisks: handoff may age if schema changes before the next maintainer resumes
backlog.firstPlanningQuestion: does the summary format need another review before remote landing?
backlog.requiredContextToLoad: admin export screen, generated summary fixture, local handoff notes
backlog.whyReadyNow: the requirement is already proven and only needs a clean resume point
